prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `5b692c0f`.
codex_response:
Rule: each connected non-background object with color `4` gets completed into a bilateral mirror image around the row or column where the `4`s are concentrated; the fuller side is reflected and replaces the sparser side. Objects without any `4` are left unchanged. The Opus summary hint was used because it matched the official examples, so no `notes.md` was needed.

Implemented the package in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_5b692c0f/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_5b692c0f/verifier.py), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_5b692c0f/generator.py). The generator builds latent symmetric axis-marked figures, trims one mirrored side for the input, includes occasional off-axis `4` accents, and sometimes adds untouched singleton noise to match the task family. No new primitive was necessary.

Validation passed: official examples `3/3`, generated examples `1000/1000`. Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/5b692c0f/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/5b692c0f/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/5b692c0f/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/5b692c0f/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/5b692c0f/previews/preview_03.png). I visually checked `preview_01.png`; the generated set looks on-family.
